ai-factory.notes: Validated against upstream 2.11.0 on the 2.x branch. AI Factory 2.11.0 bundles the native aif-rules-check skill and extension manifest schema, so AIFHub keeps only the OpenSpec generated-rules injection.

openspec.notes: OpenSpec is used as an optional artifact protocol and CLI validation/archive adapter for v1. OpenSpec skills are not installed by this extension.
